occupation_definition: Provide individuals, families, and groups with the psychosocial support needed to cope with chronic, acute, or terminal illnesses. Services include advising family caregivers. Provide patients with information and counseling, and make referrals for other services. May also provide case and care management or interventions designed to promote health, prevent disease, and address barriers to access to healthcare.

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Counselors, Social Workers, and Other Community and Social Service Specialists

siblings.occupation_title: Child, Family, and School Social Workers
Mental Health and Substance Abuse Social Workers
